meta.name: UK Charity Scrutiny Cliff-Edge Monitor

sources.name: Charity Commission full register extract (OGL v3.0)
sources.publisher: Charity Commission for England and Wales

meta.notes: 'In cliff' = active charities with latest reported income between 10% below a threshold and the threshold itself. 'Just crossed' = active charities within 10% above the threshold. Income is latest_income; charities without a reported income are excluded. Thresholds: independent examination £25,000; accruals/qualified examiner £250,000; statutory audit £1,000,000 (income test; asset test not available in this extract). Main charities only (linked charities excluded).
